name: afters
description: Afters: post-date mutual-reveal flow for Ditto. Takehome project by Soham Kolhe.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n orch,msg,dash -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm dev:orchestrator" "pnpm dev:messaging" "pnpm dev:dashboard"
scripts.codegen: pnpm --filter afters-shared run codegen && cd afters-orchestrator && python -m scripts.codegen_pydantic
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d mongo redis
